title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 18
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear a parent asking for help at home.
questions.audio_script: Dad: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming. || Boy: Sure. Do you want me to clean the windows? || Dad: I already did that this morning. || Boy: Then I can make the beds. || Dad: Your dad is doing that outside. [1]Can you put the shopping away in the cupboards[/1], please. || Boy: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first. || Dad: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive. || Dad: That should make things easier. || Dad: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

dialogue.text: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Sure. Do you want me to clean the windows?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Then I can make the beds.

dialogue.speaker: dad
dialogue.text: Your dad is doing that outside. Can you put the shopping away in the cupboards, please.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first.

dialogue.speaker: dad
dialogue.text: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive.

dialogue.speaker: dad
dialogue.text: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a teacher talking to a student.
questions.audio_script: Teacher: How is your English project going? || Student: Quite well. I found the information online and wrote the introduction last night. || Teacher: Have you added pictures of the author? || Student: Not yet, but Sam is doing that part. I thought I had to make a poster too. || Teacher: No, not for this project. [1]Please record yourself reading the poem aloud[/1]. || Student: Great. I can do that after school. || Teacher: Remember to check the spelling before you send it to me tomorrow morning. || Teacher: That should make things easier. || Teacher: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a birthday present.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you bought Sam's birthday present yet? || Girl: Not yet. I was going to get a video game, but it is too expensive this month. || Woman: What about a model car? Sam likes those. || Girl: True, but I bought something similar last year. I saw a nice sketchbook in town, and [1]I'll choose the sketchbook with thick pages[/1]. || Woman: That sounds perfect. Do you want me to come with you? || Girl: Yes, please. I always choose better presents with help. || Girl: That should make things easier. || Girl: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a visitor asking for directions inside a building.
questions.audio_script: Receptionist: Are you here for the language exam? || Visitor: Yes, but I don't know where to go. The email said it was in the main hall. || Receptionist: It was, but we had to move it because the projector stopped working. || Visitor: Is it in the science lab now? || Receptionist: No, that room is being cleaned. [1]The language exam is in the art room at the end[/1]. || Visitor: Thanks. Do I need to sign in first? || Receptionist: Yes, just write your name here, then follow the corridor to the end.

questions.context: You hear two people preparing for an event.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the concert on Sunday? || Girl: Nearly. I was going to bring programmes, but they will be given out at the door. || Woman: We might need flowers too. || Girl: Emma is bringing that, so don't worry. The organiser asked me this morning, and [1]I need to bring the spare microphone stand[/1]. || Woman: Good. Is there space in your bag? || Girl: Yes, if I take out my big coat. The forecast says it will be warm. || Girl: That should make things easier. || Girl: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a coach talking to a player.
questions.audio_script: Coach: Are you joining the practice this evening? || Player: Yes, but I'm not sure what to bring. Last week we used hockey sticks. || Coach: That was only because the hall was busy. Today we are outside again. || Player: Should I bring water bottles then? || Coach: No, the club has enough of those. [1]You should bring your cycle helmet[/1]. || Player: OK. I'll pack them with my water bottle. || Coach: Good. And arrive ten minutes early so we can start on time. || Coach: That should make things easier. || Coach: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two colleagues talking at work.
questions.audio_script: Man: Why did the meeting start late this morning? || Woman: I thought it was because there were not enough chairs, but that wasn't the main problem. || Man: Was the office door broken again? || Woman: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that [1]the report copies were sent to the wrong building[/1]. || Man: That explains it. Did anyone miss the first part? || Woman: A few people did, so the manager is sending notes to everyone this afternoon. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.
